Class TrainingBus

java.lang.Object
Bus
TrainingBus
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Bus>
public class TrainingBus extends Bus
TrainingBus - A specialized Bus for training purposes Each bus has a name,size,price,comfort level,and a list of approved trips. It is associated with a Ministry and can be reserved for trips if suitable. Subclass of Bus superclass

  • Field Summary

    tripTypes

  • Constructor Details

    • TrainingBus

      public TrainingBus(String name, int size, int price, int lev, Ministry mny, int teacherArea)
      Constructor for TrainingBus
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the bus
      size - The size of the bus
      price - The price of the bus
      lev - The level of the bus
      mny - The Ministry managing this bus
      teacherArea - The area reserved for teachers

  • Method Details

    • getTeacherArea

      public int getTeacherArea()
      Gets the teacher area allocated in the bus.
      Returns:
      the teacher area

    • setTeacherArea

      public void setTeacherArea(int teacherArea)
      Sets the teacher area for the bus.
      Parameters:
      teacherArea - the new teacher area

    • updateLocalData

      public void updateLocalData(Scanner scan)
      Updates the bus details interactively using user input. Allows modification of name, size, price, level, and teacher area. Pressing enter keeps the current value.
      Overrides:
      updateLocalData in class Bus
      Parameters:
      scan - Scanner used to read user input

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the SportsBus.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Bus
      Returns:
      formatted string containing bus details

    • toFile

      public String toFile()
      Converts the TrainingBus data into a file-friendly format.
